tool_purpose: FCN-ResNet is a Fully-Convolutional Network model using a ResNet-50 or a ResNet-101 backbone. The pre-trained models have been trained on a subset of COCO train2017, on the 20 categories that are present in the Pascal VOC dataset. Framework: PyTorch. Functionality: Fully-Convolutional Network. API call: torch.hub.load(repo_or_dir='pytorch/vision', model='fcn_resnet50', pretrained=True).
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
